name: Dynamic Select
description: Dynamically select or de-select columns using Spark expressions or column metadata.

fields.name: fieldTypes
fields.title: Select Field Types
fields.description: Select all columns matching the chosen data types

fields.name: selectExpression
fields.title: Column Selection Expression
fields.description: Spark expression evaluated per column. Use column_name, column_type, column_number.

fields.name: invertSelection
fields.title: Invert Selection
fields.description: Exclude matched columns instead of selecting them

fields.name: preserveOrder
fields.title: Preserve Input Column Order
fields.description: Maintain original column order in output
